info.title: Open Meteo
info.description: Open-Meteo is an open-source weather API and offers free access for non-commercial use. No API key required. Start using it now!

get.description: Get weather forecast data for a specific location. Provides hourly, daily, and current weather conditions with support for multiple weather variables and models.

parameters.name: latitude
parameters.description: Geographical WGS84 latitude of the location. Multiple coordinates can be comma separated.

parameters.name: longitude
parameters.description: Geographical WGS84 longitude of the location. Multiple coordinates can be comma separated. Use negative values for locations west of Greenwich.

parameters.name: elevation
parameters.description: The elevation used for statistical downscaling. Per default, a 90 meter digital elevation model is used. Set to 'nan' to disable downscaling.

parameters.name: hourly
parameters.description: A list of weather variables which should be returned. Values can be comma separated. Available variables include: temperature_2m, relative_humidity_2m, dewpoint_2m, apparent_temperature, precipitation_probability, precipitation, rain, showers, snowfall, snow_depth, weather_code, pressure_msl, surface_pressure, cloud_cover, cloud_cover_low, cloud_cover_mid, cloud_cover_high, visibility, evapotranspiration, et0_fao_evapotranspiration, vapour_pressure_deficit, wind_speed_10m, wind_speed_80m, wind_speed_120m, wind_speed_180m, wind_direction_10m, wind_direction_80m, wind_direction_120m, wind_direction_180m, wind_gusts_10m, temperature_80m, temperature_120m, temperature_180m, soil_temperature_0cm, soil_temperature_6cm, soil_temperature_18cm, soil_temperature_54cm, soil_moisture_0_1cm, soil_moisture_1_3cm, soil_moisture_3_9cm, soil_moisture_9_27cm, soil_moisture_27_81cm, uv_index, uv_index_clear_sky, is_day, sunshine_duration, cape, lifted_index, convective_inhibition, freezing_level_height, boundary_layer_height, shortwave_radiation, direct_radiation, diffuse_radiation, direct_normal_irradiance, global_tilted_irradiance, terrestrial_radiation, and many more.

parameters.name: daily
parameters.description: A list of daily weather variable aggregations which should be returned. Values can be comma separated. Available variables include: weather_code, temperature_2m_max, temperature_2m_min, apparent_temperature_max, apparent_temperature_min, sunrise, sunset, daylight_duration, sunshine_duration, uv_index_max, uv_index_clear_sky_max, precipitation_sum, rain_sum, showers_sum, snowfall_sum, precipitation_hours, precipitation_probability_max, wind_speed_10m_max, wind_gusts_10m_max, wind_direction_10m_dominant, shortwave_radiation_sum, et0_fao_evapotranspiration, and many more.

parameters.name: current
parameters.description: A list of weather variables to get current conditions. Based on 15-minutely weather model data. Available variables include: temperature_2m, relative_humidity_2m, apparent_temperature, is_day, precipitation, rain, showers, snowfall, weather_code, cloud_cover, pressure_msl, surface_pressure, wind_speed_10m, wind_direction_10m, wind_gusts_10m.

parameters.name: temperature_unit
parameters.description: Temperature unit. Options: celsius, fahrenheit

parameters.name: wind_speed_unit
parameters.description: Wind speed unit. Options: kmh, ms, mph, kn

parameters.name: precipitation_unit
parameters.description: Precipitation unit. Options: mm, inch

parameters.name: timeformat
parameters.description: Time format. Options: iso8601, unixtime

parameters.name: timezone
parameters.description: If timezone is set, all timestamps are returned as local-time. Any time zone name from the time zone database is supported. If 'auto' is set, the coordinates will be automatically resolved to the local time zone. Required if daily weather variables are specified.

parameters.name: past_days
parameters.description: If past_days is set, yesterday or the day before yesterday data are also returned.

parameters.name: forecast_days
parameters.description: Per default, only 7 days are returned. Up to 16 days of forecast are possible.

parameters.name: forecast_hours
parameters.description: Similar to forecast_days, the number of timesteps of hourly data can be controlled. Instead of using the current day as a reference, the current hour is used.

parameters.name: forecast_minutely_15
parameters.description: Similar to forecast_days, the number of timesteps of 15-minutely data can be controlled. Instead of using the current day as a reference, the current 15-minute time-step is used.

parameters.name: past_hours
parameters.description: The number of timesteps of past hourly data to return.

parameters.name: past_minutely_15
parameters.description: The number of timesteps of past 15-minutely data to return.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: The start date of the time interval to get weather data. Must be specified as an ISO8601 date (e.g. 2022-06-30).

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: The end date of the time interval to get weather data. Must be specified as an ISO8601 date (e.g. 2022-06-30).

parameters.name: start_hour
parameters.description: The start time of the time interval to get hourly weather data. Must be specified as an ISO8601 date with time (e.g. 2022-06-30T12:00).

parameters.name: end_hour
parameters.description: The end time of the time interval to get hourly weather data. Must be specified as an ISO8601 date with time (e.g. 2022-06-30T12:00).

parameters.name: start_minutely_15
parameters.description: The start time of the time interval to get 15-minutely weather data. Must be specified as an ISO8601 date with time (e.g. 2022-06-30T12:00).

parameters.name: end_minutely_15
parameters.description: The end time of the time interval to get 15-minutely weather data. Must be specified as an ISO8601 date with time (e.g. 2022-06-30T12:00).

parameters.name: models
parameters.description: Manually select one or more weather models. By default the best suitable weather model is selected automatically. Options include: best_match, ecmwf_ifs025, ecmwf_aifs025, cma_grapes_global, bom_access_global, gfs_seamless, gfs_global, gfs_hrrr, gfs_graphcast, jma_seamless, jma_msm, jma_gsm, kma_seamless, icon_seamless, icon_global, icon_eu, icon_d2, gem_seamless, gem_global, gem_regional, gem_hrdps_continental, arpege_seamless, arpege_world, arpege_europe, arome_france, arome_france_hd, meteofrance_seamless, metno_seamless, harmonie_arome_europe, knmi_seamless, dmi_seamless, ukmo_seamless, ukmo_uk2km, iconwave_seamless, iconwave_ch1, iconwave_ch2, and more.

parameters.name: cell_selection
parameters.description: Set a preference how grid-cells are selected. Options: land, sea, nearest. Default is land, which finds a suitable grid-cell on land with similar elevation to the requested coordinates. Sea prefers grid-cells on sea. Nearest selects the nearest possible grid-cell.

parameters.name: apikey
parameters.description: Only required for commercial use to authenticate your API request.

get.description: Get historical weather data for a specific location and time period.

parameters.name: latitude
parameters.description: Geographical WGS84 latitude of the location

parameters.name: longitude
parameters.description: Geographical WGS84 longitude of the location

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: The start date of the historical period (ISO8601 format: YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: The end date of the historical period (ISO8601 format: YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: hourly
parameters.description: A list of historical hourly weather variables to return

parameters.name: daily
parameters.description: A list of historical daily weather variables to return

parameters.name: temperature_unit
parameters.description: Temperature unit

parameters.name: wind_speed_unit
parameters.description: Wind speed unit

parameters.name: precipitation_unit
parameters.description: Precipitation unit

parameters.name: timezone
parameters.description: Timezone for timestamps

parameters.name: timeformat
parameters.description: Time format

get.description: Get marine weather forecast including wave height, wave direction, wave period and ocean currents.

parameters.name: latitude
parameters.description: Geographical WGS84 latitude of the location

parameters.name: longitude
parameters.description: Geographical WGS84 longitude of the location

parameters.name: hourly
parameters.description: A list of marine weather variables. Available variables include: wave_height, wave_direction, wave_period, wind_wave_height, wind_wave_direction, wind_wave_period, wind_wave_peak_period, swell_wave_height, swell_wave_direction, swell_wave_period, swell_wave_peak_period, ocean_current_velocity, ocean_current_direction.

parameters.name: daily
parameters.description: A list of daily marine weather variable aggregations

parameters.name: timezone
parameters.description: Timezone for timestamps

parameters.name: timeformat
parameters.description: Time format

parameters.name: forecast_days
parameters.description: Number of forecast days

parameters.name: past_days
parameters.description: Number of past days to include

elevation.description: Elevation in meters above sea level

generationtime_ms.description: Generation time of the weather data in milliseconds

ApiKeyAuth.name: apikey
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key for commercial use. Non-commercial use does not require an API key.

tags.name: Weather Forecast
tags.description: Weather forecast endpoints for current and future weather data

tags.name: Marine Forecast
tags.description: Marine weather forecast including wave and ocean data
